LanguageData.AB_Enabled_Desc: Automatically designate blighted plants for cutting.
LanguageData.AB_HomeZoneOnly_Desc: Only auto-cut blighted plants within your home zone.
LanguageData.AB_ShowNotification: Show notification when blight is detected
LanguageData.AB_BoostPriority_Desc: Temporarily set PlantCutting to priority 1 for all colonists when blight is active. Restores to normal when blight is cleared.
LanguageData.AB_BlockSowing_Desc: Prevent colonists from planting new crops in areas with active blight. Blight would just spread to them.
LanguageData.AB_BlightDetected: Auto Cut Blight: {0} blighted plants designated for cutting.
